context: Path:  eggs deposited along large portal veins of liver hilum Life cycle: (a)  within snail : miracidia mature into cercariae → released into water + swim → penetrate skin / intestinal wall of human host (b)  within human: in mesenteric veins ›  migration via blood + lymph vessels into lung → afterward liver → eggs released into portal circulation ›  adult worm inhabits inferior mesenteric + portal veins ›  eggs excreted in human feces → reach water → hatching of miracidia → infection of snails Path: (a)   intestinal schistosomiasis: ›  exudative granulomatous response (proctocolitis) → format
